productDisplayName: Timberland Unisex Foam Cleaner Shoe Accessories
description: Water-based Renewbuck suede and nubuck cleaner is great for getting tough stains off suede and nubuck footwear. Great for cleaning stains like salt, grass, mud, ketchup, and other things that find their way on your shoes. Contains Bitrex to prevent accidental ingestion. Method of application Remove loose surface dirt with a brush or crepe bar Surface must be clean and dry before application Apply foam cleaner to a clean dry cloth and work the cleaner into the entire shoe Do not spot clean as it may cause slight shade variances After the cleaner has been applied, use a different clean dry cloth to absorb and soak up the dirt Use our Rubber Sole Brush or our Suede Brush to restore the nap Test on a small inconspicuous area before applying the full application, as some colors may darken 6.76 fl oz bottle
